title: Generate a passwd file for users not in container
body:
If someone runs podman as a user (uid) that is not defined in the container
we want generate a passwd file so that getpwuid() will work inside of container.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: @baude This is a partial fix for the openshift running containers with UID's that are not defined in the /etc/passwd inside of the container.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #1537) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

LGTM, but it seems there is a comment from @TomSweeneyRedHat that wasn't addressed, not sure if it is worth to re-trigger the CI or can be done in a follow-up
Code LGTM, tests are passing... I think we're good to merge if the only comments are comment typos
